prompt: Create a digital receipt for Amazon orders, with showing a purchased item "iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB", using the clean screenshot layout and style as provided.
prompt_refined: Generate a digital receipt screenshot for an Amazon order. Adopt the clean, minimalist layout, typography, and color scheme (light background, dark text) of image 1. Replace the 'Google Play' branding in the top header with 'Amazon' (logo or text). Adapt the general 'Thank you' message and order detail sections to be consistent with an Amazon purchase confirmation. Specifically, within the itemized list, change the listed item to 'iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB', including a plausible price. Maintain the column structure and the left-alignment for the item name and right-alignment for the price, as depicted in image 1.
objects: Light background with dark text color scheme
Amazon branding (logo or text) in top header
Google Play branding (should not be present)
Order number and order date details
Itemized list with "Item" and "Price" column headers
Plausible price for iPhone 15 Pro Max 256GB (right-aligned)
